Verbena officinalis, commonly known as Verbena or Vervain, is a perennial herb belonging to the Verbenaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
